title: Horret's Extended Megas
description: Adds custom-made fake megas to Cobblemon 1.7!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c43354f5aa693bc7292e3fa1c822b4c591e6eb1.png)

------------------------------------------------------------------
Many thanks to ITL Supress for helping during the port from Datapack to Mod!!!
## Features
- Custom Mega Evolutions for Cobblemon Mega Showdown!
- Mega Stone recipies using the Smithing Table! Avoids any potential conflicts and remains simple!
- A small collection of animations which I've included here as a bonus!
- Full support for other Mega Showdown addons such as [Navas' ZAmega](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega)!


Due to the amount of Megas we have now, I've moved all the info regarding each one entirely to my concepting slideshow to free up space, with Noivern as an exception due to being the poster child of the addon.

 You can find all Implemented/Planned Megas [here](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Jv_nCRilrwuSk4DDSWBlejXEoIfrhl5fmoSf7GSJxUo/edit?usp=sharing)!

### Requires [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) and [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) for functionality!
------------------------------------------------------------------

## Mega Noivern

- **Fairy/Dragon** Type
- Gains the **Pixilate** Ability, which makes its Normal moves Fairy and increases their power!
- +15 Attack, +40 Sp. Atk & +45 Speed

**Noivernite**
![Noivernite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43f8bf85683420c273ba89244880557827b0b769_0.webp)
